text: <par>Judging from the inadequate data at our disposal, Miji <latinform>-o</latinform> seems to be the normal reflex of <latinform>*-a</latinform>, while <latinform>ʒ-</latinform> descends from a variety of sonorant clusters.</par>
<par>The final nasal in Miji <latinform>-cuŋ</latinform> is unexplained.</par>
